text:
December 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the segment number that CMS assigns to identify a geographic market segment or 
subdivision of a Part C plan; the segment number allows users to determine the market area covered 
by the plan. The variable describes the market segment for a given month (January through 
December). 

LONG NAME: PTC_SGMT_ID_01 
PTC_SGMT_ID_02
